pages.text:
REPURLIC CE CYPRUS

FULL FOTERS

I, Constantines

NICE EDUS, Acting minister

Forcien Affeirs of the Republic of Cyprus, do hereby authorize ir. Michael MICHAELIDES, Minister of Conmerce and Industry, to sien for and en behalf of the Government of the Republic of Cyprus the

Aprecuent for Cooneration in the field of Tourism between the Government of the Republic of Cyprus and the Government of the Republic of France.

Done in Nicosia, this Zand Day of January One

Thousand Nire Hundred and Eighty Six.

(CONSTANTINOS MICHAELIDES)

Acting minister of Forcign Affairs
